value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Claude as available on web (with a "Try Claude" call-to-action and interactive web interface), desktop (macOS and Windows downloads), and mobile (Apple App Store and Google Play). This directly substantiates the claim that Anthropic offers Claude across web, desktop, and mobile platforms.
